sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-08-29 17:39
- Distance: 11 km
- Moving time: 59:59
- Elapsed time: 1:01:37
- Elevation gain: 152.4 m
- Average heart rate: 167.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 177 bpm
- Average watts: 236.2 W
- Average speed: 11 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.4 bpm`, ranging from `152.3` to `173.1 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `160.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.8 bpm` (+12.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `170.0 spm`, with a working range of `131.9` to `180.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `164.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `174.3 spm` (+10.3 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:26 /km` across `11.024 km` in `59:59` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:17 /km` and second-half pace was `5:36 /km` (+19 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `167.1 bpm` average and `177 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `161.1 bpm` in the first half and `172.4 bpm` in the second (+11.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `59:59` out of `1:01:37` elapsed (97.3%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `1.2%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `179.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `71.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `56.8 m` in the first half and `122.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
